name: terminal-deck
description: Windows desktop terminal multiplexer powered by ConPTY.
author: yangyangxiao66

scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check preload-pet.js && node --check agent/mcp-installer.js && node --check remote/ssh-session.js && node --check remote/shell-handle.js && node --check remote/bridge-server.js && node --check mcp/remote-server.js && node --check renderer/app.js && node --check renderer/skins.js && node --check renderer/skins/catalog.js && node --check renderer/skin-shop.js && node --check renderer/pet.js && node --check scripts/renderer-smoke.js && node --check scripts/renderer-remote-smoke.js && node --check scripts/remote-bridge-smoke.js && node --check scripts/mcp-remote-smoke.js && node --check scripts/agent-mcp-installer-smoke.js && node --check scripts/mcp-bundled-runtime-smoke.js && node --check scripts/afterPack.js
scripts.dist:win:all: npm run check && electron-builder --win nsis portable --x64
